LightningComponentBundle.description: Creates an SObject form to Create/Clone/Edit an SObject.

property.name: fieldSetApiName
property.label: Fieldset API Name
property.description: Will populate fields based on the Fieldset API Name and SObject API Name

property.name: isSaveMode
property.label: Is Save Mode
property.description: If true, shows the Save button, and allows for an SObject to be inserted directly from the form

property.name: isUpdateMode
property.label: Is Update Mode
property.description: If true, will update the existing record whose Id was passed into recordId

property.name: fieldSetApiName
property.label: Fieldset API Name
property.description: Will populate fields based on the Fieldset API Name and SObject API Name

property.name: isSaveMode
property.label: Is Save Mode
property.description: If true, shows the Save button, and allows for an SObject to be inserted directly from the form

property.name: isSaveMode
property.label: Is Save Mode
property.description: If true, shows the Save button, and allows for an SObject to be inserted directly from the form

property.name: fieldSetApiName
property.label: Fieldset API Name
property.description: Will populate fields based on the Fieldset API Name and SObject API Name
